title: selago pustulosa
intro: Selago pustulosa, also known as Mountain Devil or Purple Sage, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it a valuable herb for treating wounds and infections. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, thanks to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Selago pustulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
